channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Megaport to Raise $594 Million in Australia to Fund AI Expansion
item.description: Australia’s Megaport Ltd. is seeking to raise A$827.3 million ($594 million) to support the creation of an artificial intelligence inference cloud and execute new contracts, one of the country’s biggest deals this year as companies look to finance the global … [Intel]

item.title: Megaport raises A$827M to build a distributed AI cloud and chase the inference market
item.description: Megaport spent a decade as a company you used to connect to other people’s clouds. On Wednesday it announced a plan to become one. The Australian networking firm secured four new AI infrastructure contracts worth a combined A$458.9M (about $329M) and launched…

item.title: Intel or IBM: Which Legacy Tech Stock Is the Smarter Buy for Investors in 2026?
item.description: Intel and IBM present distinct investment opportunities in 2026, with Intel focusing on AI and semiconductor growth, while IBM offers stability through hybrid cloud and quantum computing advancements. [Intel, IBM]

item.title: Nvidia CEO Pitches ‘Insane’ AI Returns to Billionaire Families
item.description: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang touted “insane” returns for investors willing to bet on the AI boom, seeking to dispel lingering concerns around the big sums spent on artificial intelligence and its long-term profitability. [Intel, Nvidia]

item.title: Greg Abel's Berkshire Hathaway Places $10 Billion Bet on Alphabet in Major Portfolio Shift
item.description: Berkshire Hathaway, under Greg Abel, invests $10 billion in Alphabet, marking a strategic shift towards technology. This move highlights Abel's influence and aligns with broader industry trends in AI. [Alphabet]
